extension_name.description: The display name for the extension.

extension_description.message: Choisissez des couleurs avec l’outil natif de macOS. Ne s’exécute que lorsque vous cliquez.
extension_description.description: Description of what the extension does.

pick_color_menu_title.description: Context menu item title to start color picking mode.

text_style_menu_title.description: Context menu item title to inspect selected text style.

popup_pick_color.description: Button label in popup to start picking a color.

popup_recent_colors.description: Section title for recent color list.

popup_no_colors.message: Aucune couleur sélectionnée pour le moment.
popup_no_colors.description: Empty state text for color history list.

popup_github_repo.description: Small footer link label in popup for opening repository page.

popup_general_picker.description: Small button label in popup to open native color chooser.

popup_general_picker_title.description: Tooltip for the popup color creator button.

popup_selected_text_style.description: Section title for selected text style inspector.

popup_inspect_selected_text.description: Button label to inspect style values of selected text.

popup_no_selected_text.description: Placeholder text when no page text is selected yet.

popup_page_size_label.description: Label for the active page size information in the popup.

popup_status_copied_value.description: Status message shown after copying a value.

popup_status_selected_value.description: Fallback status message shown after selecting a value via prompt.

popup_status_inspecting_text.description: Status message shown while text style inspection is running.

popup_status_text_style_loaded.description: Status message shown after a successful text style inspection.

popup_status_select_text_first.message: Sélectionnez d’abord un texte sur la page.
popup_status_select_text_first.description: Error shown when no selected text is available.

popup_status_inspect_text_failed.description: Error shown when text style inspection fails.

popup_status_picking_color.description: Status shown while the native color picker is opening.

popup_status_canceled.description: Status shown when the native color picker is canceled.

popup_status_pick_color_failed.description: Error shown when color picking returns no result.

popup_status_picker_start_failed.description: Error shown when the native picker cannot be started.

popup_status_load_history_failed.message: Impossible de charger l’historique des couleurs.
popup_status_load_history_failed.description: Error shown when stored color history cannot be read.

popup_status_save_color_failed.description: Error shown when the chosen color cannot be stored.

popup_copy_prompt.description: Prompt label used when clipboard access is not available.

popup_copy_value_title.description: Tooltip used for copyable values in the popup.

popup_selected_text_fallback.description: Fallback label when selected text exists but no preview text is provided.

style_label_color.description: Label for a color style value.

style_label_font.description: Label for a font family style value.

style_label_size.description: Label for a font size style value.

style_label_weight.description: Label for a font weight style value.

style_label_line_height.description: Label for a line height style value.

style_label_letter_spacing.description: Label for a letter spacing style value.

text_inspector_no_text_selected.description: Error shown when text inspection is requested without a selection.

text_inspector_selected_element_error.description: Error shown when the selected element cannot be resolved.

text_inspector_close.description: Button label for closing the on-page text inspector panel.

text_inspector_close_aria_label.description: Accessible label for the on-page text inspector close button.

text_inspector_title.description: Title of the on-page text inspector panel.

text_inspector_copy_prompt.message: Copier la valeur du style du texte
text_inspector_copy_prompt.description: Prompt shown when copying a text style value falls back to prompt.
